title: paspalum longum
intro: Paspalum longum, a perennial grass, is a plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Paspalum longum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Paspalum longum can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or by using the plant's extracts in various forms, including capsules, tinctures, and teas.
